signInToContinue: Sign in to continue planning your adventures
heroSubtitle: Drag-and-drop itineraries, real-time collaboration, and smart reminders, all in one workspace.
termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our <1>Terms of Service</1>.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Please review how TripFlow works before you continue.
terms.intro: By creating an account and using TripFlow, you agree to the following terms.

account.title: Your account
account.body: You sign in with Google. We store your name, email, and profile photo to identify you across trips. You're responsible for keeping access to your Google account secure.

data.title: Your data
data.body: Trips, places, and expenses you create are visible to collaborators you invite. We never read your email or contacts, and we don't sell your data to third parties.

usage.title: Acceptable use
usage.body: Use TripFlow to plan real trips. Don't abuse the service, attempt to access other users' data, or upload unlawful content.
